name: seo-butler
description: Your autonomous SEO/GEO butler. After you ship a site, run one command and it discovers your whole project, plans every SEO and Generative Engine Optimization task like an expert, then applies them — sitemaps, meta, structured data, alt text, llms.txt, Search Console and Analytics. It stays current by consulting live framework docs (context7) and the web, and remembers what it did so it never re-surprises you.
